loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current and voltage THD compliance and H5/H7 harmonics; flicker and crest factor are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD evolution — voltage THD and specific harmonic orders (5th/7th) are not measured by this UPS asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing load factor as K-factor proxy and power factor/phase angle directly — K-factor is not measured for this asset.
